text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF with Medicare Part A, B, C, and D, Version 2 │ May 2026 │ V 1.2 27 

ESRD_IND 

LABEL: End-Stage Renal Disease (ESRD) — Annual Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: This field specifies whether a beneficiary is entitled to Medicare benefits due to end stage renal 
disease (ESRD). This field is from the latest valid monthly ESRD indicator field (ESRD_IND_01–
ESRD_IND_12) during the year. 

LONG NAME: ESRD_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE:
